team_members.name: Marla Balladores
team_members.bio: For the past 13 years, I’ve been rocking the BPO world, and let me tell you, it’s been a rollercoaster of awesome! Each year feels like a chapter in the adventure book of my life.

team_members.name: Nikka Grajo
team_members.bio: Nikka spent eight years in the education industry and is now ready to take on new challenges by pursuing another career. She finds great fulfillment in working as a Virtual Assistant where she can stay organized, engage with colleagues, and contribute to team goals. She truly enjoys cooking and baking as her favorite ways to express her love for her family and friends.

team_members.name: Abegael Mariano
team_members.bio: With over a decade of versatile experience across multiple industries, I have cultivated and refined my expertise in digital marketing, administrative support, sales, and customer relations. My passion for continuous learning drives me to embrace challenges, recognizing that the journey.

team_members.name: Carla Mahinay
team_members.bio: I have been a committed and enthusiastic virtual assistant for more than three years, and I truly love what I do!

team_members.name: Rachelle Sorronda
team_members.bio: Rachelle is a dedicated professional with over 7 years of experience in the BPO industry, specializing in customer service, lead generation, client management, and operations leadership.

team_members.name: Stephanie Valenzuela
team_members.bio: A dynamic virtual assistant with a passion for excellence and a zest for life. With four years of experience, I pride myself on my ability to communicate effectively, both in writing and in conversation.

team_members.name: Valerie Anne Dela Cruz
team_members.bio: I am jolly and optimistic. I am very ambitious person who wants to succeed in life. With more than 2 years being a Virtual Assistant, I had experienced different situations that made me wiser and stronger.

team_members.name: Paul John Pilapil
team_members.bio: Paul is a passionate individual who loves reading books and channeling his creativity into video editing and poster design in his spare time. Recently, he took on the role of a virtual assistant for the first time, where he quickly learned and enjoyed the variety of tasks.

team_members.name: Arnav Chauhan
team_members.bio: Arnav is a self-starter, an avid reader, and an enthusiastic learner. Arnav loves learning new things and is spontaneous, with an enthusiasm for adventure.

team_members.name: Christian Deang
team_members.bio: With years of experience in Social Media Management, I have collaborated with clients in different industries. I focus on delivering high-quality work.

team_members.name: Aditi Gupta
team_members.bio: Aditi is a learner and adventurous and loves to meet new people. I have my background in mass media and journalism. I have met a number of people and have learnt a lot and I am passionate about communication, with a keen interest in how effective messaging can shape perceptions.
